hero.title: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our services
hero.description: We clearly explain the most important topics so you have all the information before choosing your service.

0.question: Do prices include taxes?
0.answer: No, all prices are PLUS VAT (16%), which is automatically added in the shopping cart. At checkout, you will see a complete breakdown including the base price, VAT, and total amount to pay.

1.question: What is the difference between a VPS and a dedicated server?
1.answer: A VPS (Virtual Private Server) shares physical resources with other users on the same server, although each one has its own isolated virtualized environment. A dedicated server provides exclusive hardware entirely for you, without shared resources, guaranteeing maximum performance, full control, and 100% dedicated resources.

2.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
2.answer: Yes, absolutely. All our plans are scalable. You can increase resources (RAM, storage, CPU) whenever your project requires it without service interruptions. Upgrades are performed easily from your control panel, and you only pay the prorated difference for the current billing period.

3.question: Do plans include technical support?
3.answer: Yes, all our plans include specialized technical support and constant monitoring of your service. Our team is available to help with server-related issues, configurations, and infrastructure performance. Support is offered through tickets, live chat, and email.

4.question: What payment methods do you accept?
4.answer: We currently accept Visa and Mastercard credit and debit cards. Payments are securely processed through our encrypted platform. All payments must be made in advance according to the billing cycle you choose (monthly, quarterly, semi-annually, or annually).

5.question: Do you offer free migration from my current provider?
5.answer: Yes, we offer basic migration assistance at no cost for shared hosting and VPS plans. Our technical team will help transfer your website, databases, and email accounts from your current provider. For more complex migrations or dedicated servers, we can evaluate the case and provide a custom quote.

6.question: Do plans include a free SSL certificate?
6.answer: Yes, all our hosting plans include a free SSL certificate (Let’s Encrypt) that renews automatically. This ensures your website has a secure HTTPS connection. If you need a premium SSL certificate with a higher validation level, we also offer paid options.

7.question: What is the technical support response time?
7.answer: Our average first response time is 1-2 hours for standard tickets and 30 minutes or less for critical emergencies. Support is available 24/7, 365 days a year. Resolution times depend on the complexity of the issue, but we strive to resolve most cases within 24 hours.

8.question: Do you perform backups of my data?
8.answer: Yes, we perform automatic daily backups of all data on our servers. However, these backups are provided as a courtesy and do not replace your own backups. We recommend maintaining independent backups of your critical content. You can download backups from your control panel at any time.

9.question: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
9.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on new shared hosting and VPS plans. If you are not satisfied with the service during the first 30 days, you may request a full refund. Dedicated servers, domains, and additional services are not covered by this guarantee. Please review our Refund Policy for more details.
